raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Corazon Care Campus will provide a safe and inclusive recreational space for children diagnosed with Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD).",
    "Corazon Care aims to transform a facility into both indoor and outdoor secure environments designed to meet the unique needs of children with ASD.",
    "The project is set to enhance the physical and emotional well-being of children with ASD.",
    "The Corazon Care Campus will offer sensory toys, outdoor play areas, and features that accommodate children with diverse sensory considerations.",
    "The Advisory Board is comprised of individuals with expertise in creating safe and inclusive spaces for children with ASD.",
    "Families with children diagnosed with Autism Spectrum Disorder face significant challenges in finding safe and enjoyable recreational experiences.",
    "The Corazon Care project represents a community's dedication to inclusivity and addresses the need for recreational spaces for children with ASD."
  ]
}
```
